subject: math
title: Geometry: Area and Perimeter
content:
Area and Perimeter

What are Area and Perimeter?

Perimeter is the distance around the outside of a shape. Imagine walking around a soccer field — that's the perimeter!

Area is the space inside a shape. Imagine mowing the grass inside a soccer field — that's the area!

Perimeter Formulas

Rectangle:
Perimeter = 2(length + width) = 2l + 2w

Square (all sides equal):
Perimeter = 4 × side

Triangle:
Perimeter = side1 + side2 + side3

Area Formulas

Rectangle:
Area = length × width = l × w

Square:
Area = side × side = side²

Triangle:
Area = 1/2 × base × height

Circle:
Area = π × radius² (r²)

Let's Practice!

Rectangle with length = 8 cm and width = 5 cm:
• Perimeter = 2(8 + 5) = 2(13) = 26 cm
• Area = 8 × 5 = 40 cm²

Square with side = 6 cm:
• Perimeter = 4(6) = 24 cm
• Area = 6 × 6 = 36 cm²

Remember!

• Perimeter is always measured in linear units (cm, m, in)
• Area is always measured in square units (cm², m², in²)
• The little ² means "square units"

questions.prompt: What is the perimeter of a rectangle with length 10cm and width 5cm?
What is the area of a rectangle with length 7 and width 4?
A square has sides of 6cm each. What is its area?
questions.hint: Area of a square = side × side

questions.prompt: What is the perimeter of a square with side 9cm?
A rectangle has length 8m and area 56m². What is its width?
